chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 6065 of 2023 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on Misc. No.28344/2023 2. For orders on Misc. No.28345/2023 3. For hearing of main case 19.12.2024 Mr. Zameer Ali advocate holds brief for Mr. Liaquat Ali Khaskheli, advocate for the petitioner This matter is pending since 2023 and even notice has not been sought / issued till date. Petition pertains to de-limitation of constituencies, however, even the election has been held subsequently. Prima facie petition appears to have become infructuous, hence, dismissed. Judge Judge Amjad
